non_derivative_transactions.transaction_summary: The reporting owner disposed 12039.0 shares of Common Shares at $12.495 (Code S). [Note 2: The transaction was executed in multiple trades at prices ranging from $12.35 to $12.62. The price reported reflects the average sale price. The reporting person undertakes to provide the SEC staff, the issuer or a security holder of the issuer, upon request, full information regarding the number of shares sold at each separate price.]
